principle: Archive/stage/load behavior must be ported from original file-open, archive-parse, table, and trace evidence. This report does not authorize fake Challenge stage mappings.
findings: DVDOpen has 2 static callers in the current index: 0x802754ec FUN_802754ec, 0x802756fc FUN_802756fc.
HSD_ArchiveParse has 2 static callers in the current index: 0x80006c88 zz_0006c88_, 0x8004d548 zz_004d548_.
0x800419ec reads DAT_803bb4a0, FLOAT_80437068 and constants 0x3e4, 4, 0x0, 0x600, 0x604, 0x14, 0xc28, 0xff before calling 0x80006c88 zz_0006c88_.

0x80006c88 calls 0x8025b00c gnt4_HSD_ArchiveParse_bl, 0x8025b178 zz_025b178_, 0x8025b1b0 gnt4_HSD_ArchiveGetPublicAddress_bl; this is the proven parse/public-address wrapper for active object archive data.
boot.dol static stage-code scan still has 0 st## hits, so Challenge arena selection still requires runtime archive-open tracing.

roots.label: DVDOpen SDK import
roots.relevance: Lowest-level static file-open primitive currently visible in the decomp index.

roots.label: gcCiOpen-style DVDOpen wrapper
roots.relevance: Validates filenames and reports DVDOpen failures before reading archives/files.

roots.label: gcCiGetF-style open/close wrapper
roots.relevance: Opens a file path, checks file length, and closes the DVD handle.

roots.label: HSD_ArchiveParse SDK import
roots.relevance: Original HSD archive parser used by model/animation/public-symbol data paths.

roots.label: HSD_ArchiveGetPublicAddress SDK import
roots.relevance: Original public-symbol lookup after archive parse.

roots.label: HSD archive parse/public-address wrapper
roots.relevance: Parses an HSD archive and iterates public entries for runtime object data.

roots.label: secondary HSD archive parse wrapper
roots.relevance: Allocates/initializes a parsed archive path reached from object setup helpers.

roots.label: active object archive attach path
roots.relevance: Reads DAT_803bb4a0 by object slot/type state and calls the HSD archive wrapper used by spawn/init.

roots.label: active borg spawn init
roots.relevance: Challenge/battle spawn path that calls the active archive attach function.

roots.label: active object init
roots.relevance: Related active object path that also calls the active archive attach function.

provenChains.proves: battle spawn init reaches original HSD_ArchiveParse through the active archive attach wrapper
active object init reaches original HSD_ArchiveParse through the same attach wrapper
spawn init reaches HSD public-symbol lookup after archive parse
secondary object setup path reaches original HSD_ArchiveParse

requiredNextTraceTasks: Break on 0x802754ec, 0x802756fc, and 0x8020d1ec while entering Challenge battle 1 and record filename strings.
Break on 0x8025b00c and 0x80006c88 during the same run to connect loaded archive bytes to parsed HSD public names.
Watch DAT_803bb4a0 and object+0x3e4 in 0x800419ec to confirm which slot/type selects each object archive pointer.
Do not map human arena names or Challenge stage rotation to st## until the trace records the selected st## archive IDs.
